features: Helps to combat bad odours and control perspiration
Combats bad odours and controls perspiration
description: Product Description This anti Perspirant combines 3 heat resistant properties: 1. Helps to combat bad odours and control perspiration 2. Helps combat wetness 3. Fresh fragrance. Ingredients Isobutane, Aqua / Water, Dimethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Parfum / Fragrance, Phenoxyethanol, Dimethiconol, Limonene, Linalool, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citronellol, Citral, Lauryl PEG-9 Polydimethylsiloxyethyl Dimethicone, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Please check back of pack for up to date ingredients Directions Apply a thin, even layer to underarms and neck, allow to dry, reapply as needed.
